title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
